creator: checo1705@secmail.pro
text:
Created attachment 207085
np2kai shar

A port of the Neko Project II kai fork, however it lacks network support being patched out from Makefile.am, everything else works just fine, and has options for choosing which emulator. It is for the gtk20 version labelled x11, sdl2 version does compile (with network patched out aswell) but requires to have fetched from git.
